A certified Crystal Veil Cartographer, Rowena Glasgow relies on the Slate Edge Endowment as her primary funding source for her mapping projects. Her research is prominently featured in Scarlet Compass Books, further establishing her reputation in the field of cartography. Alongside her professional pursuits, she volunteers as a recruiter for Lattice Lane Studio, demonstrating her commitment to community engagement. Rowena's use of Lithuanian words in her work reflects her appreciation for cultural diversity and linguistic richness. Her contributions in both her career and civic endeavors underscore her dedication to her art and community.
